{'reasoning': 'Axis order by depth is [Z, X, Y, Z, X, Y, Z, X]. Depth = path length (depth 8 are the leaf nodes). A node is landlocked iff its X, Y, and Z ranges are strictly within (0,1) (it touches none of the faces x=0/1, y=0/1, z=0/1). With this split sequence, landlocked nodes first appear at depth 6, so only depths 6–8 have landlocked nodes.', 'nodes': ['000111', '001110', '010101', '011100', '100011', '101010', '110001', '111000', '0000111', '0001110', '0001111', '0010101', '0011100', '0011101', '0100011', '0101010', '0101011', '0110001', '0111000', '0111001', '1000110', '1000111', '1001110', '1010100', '1010101', '1011100', '1100010', '1100011', '1101010', '1110000', '1110001', '1111000', '00000111', '00001110', '00001111', '00010101', '00010111', '00011100', '00011101', '00011110', '00011111', '00100011', '00101010', '00101011', '00110001', '00110011', '00111000', '00111001', '00111010', '00111011', '01000110', '01000111', '01001110', '01010100', '01010101', '01010110', '01010111', '01011100', '01011110', '01100010', '01100011', '01101010', '01110000', '01110001', '01110010', '01110011', '01111000', '01111010', '10000101', '10000111', '10001100', '10001101', '10001110', '10001111', '10010101', '10011100', '10011101', '10100001', '10100011', '10101000', '10101001', '10101010', '10101011', '10110001', '10111000', '10111001', '11000100', '11000101', '11000110', '11000111', '11001100', '11001110', '11010100', '11010101', '11011100', '11100000', '11100001', '11100010', '11100011', '11101000', '11101010', '11110000', '11110001', '11111000']}
